location_updates.name: Users can view their own location updates
Friends can view location updates if permitted
location_updates.definition: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM follows f WHERE f.follower_id = auth.uid() AND f.following_id = location_updates.user_id) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM friend_proximity_permissions fpp WHERE fpp.user_id = fpp.user_id AND fpp.friend_id = auth.uid() AND fpp.is_enabled = false)

location_updates.name: Users can insert their own location updates
Users can update their own location updates
Users can delete their own location updates

proximity_alert_settings.name: Users can manage their own proximity settings

friend_proximity_permissions.name: Users can manage their friend permissions
Friends can view permissions that affect them

safe_zones.name: Users can manage their own safe zones

proximity_alerts_log.name: Users can view their own proximity alerts log
Users can insert their own proximity alerts log

location_social_context.name: Anyone can view location social context
Authenticated users can insert location social context
Authenticated users can update location social context

notification_throttling.name: Users can manage their own notification throttling
